targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM executions WHERE (${execution:raw} = 0 OR id = ${execution:raw});
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM executions WHERE status = 1 AND (${execution:raw} = 0 OR id = ${execution:raw});
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM executions WHERE status = 2 AND (${execution:raw} = 0 OR id = ${execution:raw});
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM executions WHERE status = 3 AND (${execution:raw} = 0 OR id = ${execution:raw});
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM executions WHERE status IN (4, 5) AND (${execution:raw} = 0 OR id = ${execution:raw});
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scenarios;

SELECT
  e.name,
  s.name AS scenario_name,
  e.status,
  e.createdat,
  e.startedat,
  e.completedat,
  COALESCE(ev.event_count, 0) AS event_count
FROM executions e
LEFT JOIN scenarios s ON e.scenarioid = s.id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT executionid, COUNT(*) AS event_count
  FROM execution_events
  WHERE (${execution:raw} = 0 OR executionid = ${execution:raw})
GROUP BY executionid
) ev ON ev.executionid = e.id
ORDER BY e.createdat DESC
LIMIT 20;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM machines;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM machines WHERE statusup = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM machines WHERE statusup IN (9, 10);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM machines WHERE statusup IN (2, 10);

SELECT
  $__timeGroup(createdutc, '1h', 0),
  SUM(CASE WHEN statusup = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Up",
  SUM(CASE WHEN statusup IN (9, 10) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Down",
  SUM(CASE WHEN statusup IN (2, 10) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Errors"
FROM machines
WHERE $__timeFilter(createdutc)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  name,
  fqdn,
  statusup,
  clientversion,
  currentusername,
  lastreportedutc
FROM machines
ORDER BY lastreportedutc DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM history_timeline WHERE $__timeFilter(createdutc);
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT machineid) FROM history_timeline WHERE $__timeFilter(createdutc);
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT handler) FROM history_timeline WHERE $__timeFilter(createdutc);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM history_health WHERE $__timeFilter(createdutc);

SELECT
  $__timeGroup(createdutc, '1h', 0),
  handler AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM history_timeline
WHERE $__timeFilter(createdutc)
GROUP BY time, handler
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  handler,
  COUNT(*) AS event_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT machineid) AS machine_count
FROM history_timeline
WHERE $__timeFilter(createdutc)
GROUP BY handler
ORDER BY event_count DESC;

SELECT
  status,
  COUNT(*) AS update_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT machineid) AS machine_count
FROM machine_updates
WHERE $__timeFilter(createdutc)
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY update_count DESC;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM npcs;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM npc_social_connections JOIN npcs n ON npc_social_connections.npcid = n.id WHERE (${execution:raw} = 0 OR n.executionid = ${execution:raw});
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM npc_beliefs JOIN npcs n ON npc_beliefs.npcid = n.id WHERE (${execution:raw} = 0 OR n.executionid = ${execution:raw});
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM npc_learning JOIN npcs n ON npc_learning.npcid = n.id WHERE (${execution:raw} = 0 OR n.executionid = ${execution:raw});
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM npc_activity JOIN npcs n ON npc_activity.npcid = n.id WHERE (${execution:raw} = 0 OR n.executionid = ${execution:raw});
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM npc_preferences JOIN npcs n ON npc_preferences.npcid = n.id WHERE (${execution:raw} = 0 OR n.executionid = ${execution:raw});

SELECT $__timeGroup(npc_beliefs.createdutc, '1h', 0), COUNT(*) AS "Beliefs" FROM npc_beliefs JOIN npcs n ON npc_beliefs.npcid = n.id WHERE $__timeFilter(npc_beliefs.createdutc)  AND (${execution:raw} = 0 OR n.executionid = ${execution:raw})
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeGroup(npc_social_connections.createdutc, '1h', 0), COUNT(*) AS "Connections" FROM npc_social_connections JOIN npcs n ON npc_social_connections.npcid = n.id WHERE $__timeFilter(npc_social_connections.createdutc)  AND (${execution:raw} = 0 OR n.executionid = ${execution:raw})
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeGroup(npc_learning.createdutc, '1h', 0), COUNT(*) AS "Learning" FROM npc_learning JOIN npcs n ON npc_learning.npcid = n.id WHERE $__timeFilter(npc_learning.createdutc)  AND (${execution:raw} = 0 OR n.executionid = ${execution:raw})
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeGroup(npc_activity.createdutc, '1h', 0), COUNT(*) AS "Activities" FROM npc_activity JOIN npcs n ON npc_activity.npcid = n.id WHERE $__timeFilter(npc_activity.createdutc)  AND (${execution:raw} = 0 OR n.executionid = ${execution:raw})
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeGroup(npc_preferences.createdutc, '1h', 0), COUNT(*) AS "Preferences" FROM npc_preferences JOIN npcs n ON npc_preferences.npcid = n.id WHERE $__timeFilter(npc_preferences.createdutc)  AND (${execution:raw} = 0 OR n.executionid = ${execution:raw})
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT
  $__timeGroup(timestamp, '1h', 0),
  severity AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM execution_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
 AND (${execution:raw} = 0 OR executionid = ${execution:raw})
GROUP BY time, severity
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  e.name AS execution_name,
  ev.timestamp,
  ev.eventtype,
  ev.severity,
  ev.description
FROM execution_events ev
JOIN executions e ON ev.executionid = e.id
WHERE $__timeFilter(ev.timestamp)
 AND (${execution:raw} = 0 OR ev.executionid = ${execution:raw})
ORDER BY ev.timestamp DESC
LIMIT 100;

list.label: Execution
list.name: execution
list.query: SELECT e.name || ' (' || to_char(e.createdat, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ')' as __text, e.id::text as __value FROM executions e ORDER BY e.createdat DESC
